options.name: --password

endpoint

options.name: --server-message-mode

options.name: --server-security-policy
options.description:

values are: None (default), Basic128Rsa15, Basic256, Basic256Sha256

options.name: --server-url

endpoint

options.name: --session-failed-connection-retry-interval-seconds
options.description:
Specifies the rate, in seconds, at which 
the channel attempts to reconnect if it fails to connect or becomes 
disconnected

options.name: --session-renewal-interval-minutes
options.description:
Specifies the time, in minutes, between 
channel renewals

options.name: --session-timeout-inactive-minutes
options.description:
Specifies the maximum amount of time, in 
minutes, a session remains open without activity

options.name: --session-watchdog-timeout
options.description:
Specifies the rate the client reads the 
server status state node

options.name: --username
options.description:
UserName for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --verbose

Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

options.description:
Specifies the ratio of write operations to
read operations, based on one read per configurable number of writes.

formatted. Valid values are: Standard, Advanced (default)

options.description:
The Quality of Service level 
(AtMostOnce=0, AtLeastOnce=1, ExactlyOnce=2)

options.description:

at which the agent pushes data to the endpoint

options.description:
Sets the media type for Publishing. Only 
valid when PublishMessageFormat is set to (Advanced). Valid values are: Json 
(default), Xml, XhtmlXml, TextPlain, TextHtml

options.name: --publish-message-format
options.description:
Specifies how messages should be 
formatted. Valid values are: Standard, Advanced (default)

options.name: --rate
options.description:
Specifies the frequency, in milliseconds, 
at which the agent pushes data to the endpoint

options.name: --send-initial-update
options.description:
Indicates if an initial update should be 
sent out on each tag when the Iot Agent starts up

options.name: --server-url
options.description:
Server Url for Kepserver configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --transaction-timeout
options.description:
Defines the maximum amount of time, in 
seconds, allowed for a transaction to run

options.name: --url
options.description: The URl of the endpoint to send data to

options.name: --url-password
options.description:
The password to use when calling the URl 
endpoint

options.name: --url-username
options.description:
The username to use when calling the URl 
endpoint

options.name: --username
options.description:
UserName for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

SendEveryScan is false (default: 0)

Indicates whether the Iot Item is enabled 
(default: true)

options.description: Iot Agent Name

options.name: --password

Password for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --scan-rate
options.description:
Specifies the frequency, in milliseconds, 
at which the iot item should be scanned (default: 10000)

options.name: --send-every-scan
options.description:
Specifies if the tag should be published 
on every scan or only on data changes (default: false)

options.name: --server-tag
options.description:
The server tag the Iot Item is pointing 
to

options.description:
Server Url for Kepserver configuration 
endpoint

endpoint
